title: loadmess
description: send a message when the patch is loaded

messages.description: the loaded message (when the patch is loaded or when banged/clicked)

flags.name: @defer <0/1>
flags.description:
output is deferred (@defer 0 will be sent before @defer 1)
default: 0

methods.description: set followed by any message sets the message held by loadmess without any output

body: [loadmess] outputs a message automatically when the patch is loaded, or when the patch is an abstraction of another patch that is opened.
